chunks.title: Call to Praise and Remembrance
chunks.reason: An introductory call to the community to remember God's deeds.

chunks.title: God's Covenant and Protection of Patriarchs
chunks.reason: A declaration of God's covenant with Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob.

chunks.title: The Rise of Joseph in Egypt
chunks.reason: Narrative account of Joseph's journey from slavery to power.

chunks.title: Israel in Egypt and the Plagues
chunks.reason: Narrative of Israel's arrival in Egypt and the ten plagues.

chunks.title: The Exodus and Entry into Canaan
chunks.reason: Narrative of the departure from Egypt and possession of the land.
